leadText: Wicked Blow (Japanese: あんこくきょうだ Dark Blow) is a damage-dealing Dark-type move introduced during Generation VIII, in The Isle of Armor. It is the signature move of Single Strike Style Urshifu.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generation VIII 1.1.1 Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl 1.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Wicked Blow inflicts damage and will always result in a critical hit unless the target has Battle Armor or Shell Armor . Wicked Blow has a base power of 80. Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Wicked Blow cannot be selected in a battle. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Wicked Blow's base power was reduced to 75.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This attack always results in a critical hit. BD SP This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered. S V The user, having mastered the Dark style, strikes the target with a fierce blow. This move always lands a critical hit.
